tasks.title: Fix checkout discount/tax ordering
tasks.issue: Checkout totals are too high because the discount is applied after tax. Apply the discount to the subtotal first, then calculate tax on the discounted subtotal. The public target repo fails `npm test` on main and passes on the golden fix branch.

candidateFiles.preview: const tax = calculateTax(subtotal, taxRate); const postTaxTotal = subtotal + tax; return applyDiscount(postTaxTotal, discount)
export function applyDiscount(amount, discount) { return roundMoney(Math.max(0, amount - discount)) }
export function calculateTax(amount, taxRate) { return roundMoney(amount * taxRate) }
Pricing rules say discounts must be applied before tax. Example total is 88.
Log summarized to the observed failure: subtotal=100 discount=20 taxRate=0.1 total=90.
Generated inventory and analytics client. Low relevance and high token cost.
Authentication session helper unrelated to checkout totals.
Admin dashboard aggregation unrelated to pricing behavior.

cachedNova.rootCause: The checkout total calculates tax from the original subtotal, then subtracts the discount from the post-tax amount.
cachedNova.patch: In src/checkout/pricing.js, compute discountedSubtotal first, calculate tax on that discounted amount, and return discountedSubtotal + tax.
cachedNova.test: npm test fails on main with 90 !== 88 and passes on golden/fix-checkout-tax-order.
